misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: Toni, hailing from Hirsala Golf, embodies the very spirit of the Hector Trophée, not only as a formidable competitor but also as the primary organizer whose vision brought this esteemed event to fruition. His consistent presence is remarkable; the forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will mark his thirteenth consecutive appearance, a testament to his profound dedication to the tournament's enduring legacy.

Across his twelve prior participations, Toni has established himself as a prominent figure in the competitive landscape. He has hoisted the coveted Hector Trophée on three separate occasions, showcasing a consistent ability to perform at the highest level within the pair competition. Furthermore, his individual prowess is equally undeniable, as evidenced by his two Victor Trophy victories, distinguishing him as one of the few players to excel in both formats of this challenging event.

As the tournament approaches its thirteenth iteration, Toni's dual role as architect and athlete continues to shape its identity. His deep understanding of the course, coupled with his strategic acumen and an unwavering competitive drive, consistently positions him as a player to watch. His contributions, both on and off the greens, are integral to the unique prestige that the Hector Trophée commands each year.
